ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response shows an attempt to be calm and guiding, but the tone might come off as too talkative for a healer in urgent need.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response acknowledges gravity without fully engaging with the immediate context of panic and time sensitivity, lacking a personal touch that would resonate in this scenario.
